channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Rape allegation against Jay-Z won’t impact NFL's relationship with music mogul, Goodell says
item.description: IRVING, Texas (AP) — A rape allegation against rapper Jay-Z, whose company Roc Nation has produced some of the NFL's entertainment presentations including the Super Bowl halftime show, won’t impact the league's relationship with the music mogul.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Wisconsin kayaker who faked his death and fled the country is charged after returning to US
item.description: GREEN LAKE, Wis. (AP) — A Wisconsin man who faked his own drowning and left his wife and three children for Eastern Europe willingly returned to the U.S. after four months and was charged Wednesday with obstructing an intense lake search for his body.
item.dc:creator: TODD RICHMOND, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Luxury real estate brokers charged in federal indictment with sex trafficking in NYC
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two luxury real estate brokers and their brother have been charged with luring, drugging and violently raping dozens of women over more than a decade, according to a federal indictment unsealed Wednesday in Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What Florida’s oldest WWII vet wants for his 108th birthday; how you can help
item.description: Monfort’s extraordinary life includes serving as one of the first Navy radiomen to receive distress calls during the attack on Pearl Harbor.
item.dc:creator: Brody Wooddell, NewsNation

item.title: Will TikTok be banned in January? Here's where things stand as deadline nears
item.description: You may not be able to doomscroll on TikTok much longer unless the social media company finds a way to stop a new law from going into effect.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brazil’s President Lula to undergo a new surgery after initial procedure for brain bleed
item.description: RIO DE JANEIRO (AP) — Brazilian President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva will undergo another surgery, doctors at the Sirio-Libanes hospital where the leftist leader is being treated said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ELÉONORE HUGHES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Arizona AG sues Saudi firm over 'excessive' groundwater pumping, saying it's a public nuisance
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes announced Wednesday she's suing a Saudi Arabian agribusiness for allegedly violating a public nuisance law, contending that its groundwater pumping threatens the public health, safety and infrastructure of local communities in a rural western county
item.dc:creator: GABRIEL SANDOVAL and ANITA SNOW, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Hannah Kobayashi, missing Hawaii woman whose disappearance prompted a massive search, is found safe
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Hannah Kobayashi, the missing Hawaii woman whose disappearance prompted a massive search and a missing persons investigation in Los Angeles, has been found safe, police said Wednesday. Kobayashi vanished last month in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Albertsons sues Kroger for failing to win approval of their proposed supermarket merger
item.description: Kroger and Albertsons' plan for the largest U.S. supermarket merger in history crumbled Wednesday, with Albertsons pulling out of the $24.6 billion deal and the two companies accusing each other of not doing enough to push their proposed alliance through.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What happens next with Alex Jones' Infowars? No certainty yet after sale to The Onion is rejected
item.description: The Onion's rejected purchase of Infowars in an auction bid supported by families of the Sandy Hook Elementary shooting dealt them a new setback Wednesday and clouded the future of Alex Jones' conspiracy theory platform, which is now poised to remain in his control for at least the near future.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Hegseth meets with moderate Sen. Collins as he lobbies for key votes in the Senate
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s nominee to lead the Defense Department said he had a “wonderful conversation” with Maine Sen.
item.dc:creator: Mary Clare Jalonick And Matt Brown, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Strong demand for real Christmas trees boosts Texas economy
item.description: More than four million Christmas trees are sold each year in Texas, according to the Texas A&M Forest Service.
item.dc:creator: Tom Miller, NewsNation

item.title: Atmospheric river brings weather whiplash to East Coast as bomb cyclone develops
item.description: PORTLAND, Maine (AP) — The U.S. East Coast began a whiplash-inducing stretch of weather Wednesday with a deluge of rain, rapid snowmelt and powerful gusts, creating dangerous conditions, due in part to an atmospheric river and developing bomb cyclone.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE and DAVID SHARP, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Wanted posters appear in NYC listing healthcare CEOs after shooting
item.description: Videos circulating on social media show wanted posters in New York City with photos of healthcare CEOs a week after the fatal shooting of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson in Midtown.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Homeland Security shares new details of mysterious drone flights over New Jersey, lawmaker says
item.description: A New Jersey lawmaker from part of the state where several mysterious drones have been spotted in recent week says the devices appear to avoid detection by traditional methods.
item.dc:creator: Bruce Shipkowski, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump, team trail Fauci on trust as medical information source: Survey
item.description: Trump and other Republicans have criticized Fauci, who was the face of the first Trump and Biden administration’s response against COVID-19, over his handling of the pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Murdaugh lawyers file appeal alleging ousted South Carolina court clerk swayed jury
item.description: Attorneys for Alex Murdaugh, 56, filed an appeal for a new murder trial on Tuesday, citing improper testimony and Becky Hill's alleged jury tampering.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio lawmaker proposes bill to make ‘flag planting’ in Ohio State stadium a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee between the Michigan and Ohio State football teams, an Ohio state lawmaker has introduced a new bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony criminal offense.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, KRON4

item.title: Bernie Sanders drops major hint about political future
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.), one of the Senate’s most prominent progressives, says he likely won’t run again for the Senate after his fourth term expires in 2030. Asked in an interview with Politico whether this would be his last term in Congress, Sanders replied: “I’m 83 now.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KTLA 5

item.title: Luigi Mangione's fingerprints match water bottle found near shooting: sources
item.description: Fingerprints taken from Luigi Mangione in Pennsylvania matched those on a water bottle found near the scene of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson's fatal shooting, sources said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, KRON4

item.title: Luigi Mangione was reported missing 2 weeks before CEO slain: police
item.description: The parents of Luigi Mangione, the man suspected of shooting and killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, told law enforcement that they hadn't heard from their son in months.
item.dc:creator: Video credit: Nicole Johnson, ABC 4

item.title: Celebrities and coastal residents flee from wind-driven wildfire in Malibu
item.description: MALIBU, Calif. (AP) — Evacuation orders and warnings have gone out to 20,000 Southern California residents Tuesday as firefighters battled a wind-driven wildfire in Malibu that burned near celebrities' seaside mansions, horse farms and Pepperdine University, the sheriff's department said.
item.dc:creator: JAE C. HONG, ERIC THAYER and CHRISTOPHER WEBER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mega Millions winner sues for other half of $394M jackpot, claims he bought both tickets
item.description: A man is suing the California Lottery, claiming he bought both winning tickets for a $394 million Mega Millions jackpot but lost one and is owed the remaining $197 million.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump's picks for key positions in his second administration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has filled the key posts for his second term in office, prioritizing loyalty to him after he felt bruised and hampered by internal squabbling during his first term.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DA suggests unusual idea for halting Trump’s hush money case while upholding his conviction
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Eager to preserve President-elect Donald Trump ’s hush money conviction even as he returns to office, prosecutors are suggesting various ways forward — including one based on how some courts handle criminal cases when defendants die. Trump’s spokesperson called the ideas “pathetic.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: US wildlife officials plan to label monarch butterflies as threatened species
item.description: The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service plans to add the butterfly to the threatened species list by the end of next year following an extensive public comment period.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Family of suspect speaks out after his arrest in UnitedHealthcare CEO's murder
item.description: The family of Luigi Mangione, the 26-year-old man accused of killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson in New York City, has released a statement following his arrest on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, Fox 5

item.title: Military pauses Osprey flights again after more metal failures are found in near crash in November
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Pentagon is temporarily pausing flights again of its fleet of V-22 Ospreys after weakened metal components possibly played a role in another near crash, the latest setback for an embattled aircraft whose safety problems have grown.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Judge dismisses charges against Karen Read supporter who scattered rubber ducks and fake $100 bills
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — A Massachusetts judge dismissed criminal charges Monday against a backer of Karen Read who admitted placing dozens of yellow rubber ducks and fake $100 bills around town in support of Read. Richard Schiffer Jr.
item.dc:creator: STEVE LeBLANC, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: La Linea, Sinaloa cartel unleash violence in Chihuahua
item.description: Mexican authorities say they have “restored order” in parts of the state of Chihuahua where organized criminal gangs engaged in violent confrontations in the past few days.
item.dc:creator: Julian Resendiz, KTLA 5

item.title: Mother arrested after posting video of herself kicking infant: police
item.description: A woman accused of kicking an infant multiple times has been arrested after she uploaded video of the abuse online, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Alicia Patton, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Suspect in UnitedHealthcare CEO killing charged with murder, court records show
item.description: A man in Pennsylvania has been arrested in connection with the fatal shooting of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, officials said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Polygamist with 20 'wives' to be sentenced for sex acts with children
item.description: A polygamous religious leader who claimed more than 20 spiritual “wives ” including 10 underage girls faces decades in prison at his sentencing on Monday for coercing girls as young as 9 years old to submit to criminal sex acts with him and other adults.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lara Trump stepping down from RNC amid Senate speculation
item.description: Lara Trump is stepping down as co-chair of the Republican National Committee (RNC) as she considers replacing Florida Sen. Marco Rubio (R), whom her father-in-law, President-elect Donald Trump, picked to be secretary of State.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WGN 9

item.title: Gas prices drop to lowest in 3 years, AAA says
item.description: Good news for the millions of drivers on American roads: gas prices are falling. The national average for a gallon of gas has hit a three-year low, the American Automobile Association (AAA) recently announced.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, Fox 5

item.title: Gas prices drop to lowest in 3 years, AAA says
item.description: Good news for the millions of drivers on American roads: gas prices are falling. The national average for a gallon of gas has hit a three-year low, the American Automobile Association (AAA) recently announced.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, WGN 9
